missionFrame.function: Pelagos suffers rapid sea-level oscillation around the Caldera Array as export demands continue to use an obsolete census. Floating communities omitted from the official model are now inside the projected storm-surge zone.
missionFrame.dramaticQuestion: Who counts when a system calculates how much a world can safely give away?

forbiddenOutcomes: end Broken Accord from a single failed check
remove player agency from command decisions
resolve the lattice burden without authored evidence

phases.title: Pelagic Warning
phases.summary: The Caldera Array reports rapid sea-level oscillation while Crown Station continues demanding exports under an obsolete population model.
objectives: Establish current water and population data.
pressures: Several communities are missing from the official census.
Export schedules are already committed elsewhere.
Storm season limits safe operating windows.
phases.directorPurpose: The Caldera Array reports rapid sea-level oscillation while Crown Station continues demanding exports under an obsolete population model.
playerFacingObjectives: Establish current water and population data.

phases.title: The Rising Shelf
phases.summary: Floating districts, transfer platforms, and deep-water systems enter different phases of the surge as the Eudora Vale coordinates rescue and ballast control.
objectives: Preserve the Array as usable infrastructure.
pressures: Local pilots demand authority over approaches.
phases.directorPurpose: Floating districts, transfer platforms, and deep-water systems enter different phases of the surge as the Eudora Vale coordinates rescue and ballast control.
playerFacingObjectives: Preserve the Array as usable infrastructure.

phases.title: The Missing Cities
phases.summary: The ship verifies that the export formula counts abandoned settlements and omits newer floating cities, making its precision politically obsolete.
objectives: Authenticate current population and capacity data.
Determine whether emergency correction is technically safe.
Prepare options for export control and future census authority.
pressures: The Secretariat warns against unilateral formula changes.
Every hour of export changes downstream weather.
phases.directorPurpose: The ship verifies that the export formula counts abandoned settlements and omits newer floating cities, making its precision politically obsolete.
playerFacingObjectives: Authenticate current population and capacity data.
Determine whether emergency correction is technically safe.
Prepare options for export control and future census authority.

phases.title: The Weight of Water
phases.summary: The acting captain chooses whether to halt, reduce, reroute, or continue exports and determines who has standing to set provisional quotas.
objectives: Set a census or quota review process.
pressures: A technically safe average may drown a specific city.
A short-term halt can damage Aurelian crops.
Enforcement may convert water infrastructure into a security front.
phases.directorPurpose: The acting captain chooses whether to halt, reduce, reroute, or continue exports and determines who has standing to set provisional quotas.
playerFacingObjectives: Set a census or quota review process.

phases.title: A New Ledger
phases.summary: The mission records survivors, export status, platform condition, census legitimacy, and obligations that persist into later allocation negotiations.
objectives: Name remaining storm and export risks.
Record whether Salt Debt becomes available or urgent.
pressures: The storm continues according to established weather.
Other worlds respond to reduced or continued exports.
Local cooperation depends on how omitted communities were treated.
phases.directorPurpose: The mission records survivors, export status, platform condition, census legitimacy, and obligations that persist into later allocation negotiations.
playerFacingObjectives: Name remaining storm and export risks.
Record whether Salt Debt becomes available or urgent.

directorFocusRules.summary: Preserve player command agency and accept freeform plans that satisfy visible constraints.
Every technical success moves burden, risk, evidence, or legitimacy somewhere visible.

competencePolicy.playerCompetence: The player character is a trained Starfleet officer. Apply routine competence before asking for checks.
competencePolicy.crewCompetence: Senior staff act professionally within their disciplines and report material risks.

decisionPoints.title: Control the Export
decisionPoints.prompt: How will the Eudora Vale protect Pelagic communities while accounting for the worlds that depend on continued water vapor transfer?

commandDecisions.title: Control the Export
commandDecisions.summary: How will the Eudora Vale protect Pelagic communities while accounting for the worlds that depend on continued water vapor transfer?
commandDecisions.awardPolicy: Apply consequences through distribution-equity, public-legitimacy, ecological-continuity, nacre-secession-pressure.

outcomeFlags.title: Control the Export
outcomeFlags.summary: How will the Eudora Vale protect Pelagic communities while accounting for the worlds that depend on continued water vapor transfer?

endStates.title: The Weight of Water Complete
endStates.summary: The mission resolves and transitions to chapter-3-borrowed-breath.

endStates.title: The Weight of Water Transformed
endStates.summary: The mission goal changes under pressure while the campaign continues.
